'''daguwu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pneumotachometer|pneumotachometer]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-g-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pneumotachometer|pneumotachometer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| daguwu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dægiwith|dægiwith]] || [[word:dægiwij|dægiwij]] || [[word:dægiwish|dægiwish]] || [[word:dægiwi|dægiwi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:daguguwuth|daguguwuth]] || [[word:daguguwuj|daguguwuj]] || [[word:daguguwush|daguguwush]] || [[word:daguguwu|daguguwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:daguwuth|daguwuth]] || [[word:daguwuj|daguwuj]] || [[word:daguwush|daguwush]] || [[word:daguwu|daguwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dagufwuth|dagufwuth]] || [[word:dagufwuj|dagufwuj]] || [[word:dagufwush|dagufwush]] || [[word:dagufwuf|dagufwuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:daguwuthu|daguwuthu]] || [[word:daguwuju|daguwuju]] || [[word:daguwushu|daguwushu]] || [[word:daguwuku|daguwuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:daguwuth|daguwuth]] || [[word:daguwuj|daguwuj]] || [[word:daguwush|daguwush]] || [[word:daguwu|daguwu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:daguwuthul|daguwuthul]] || [[word:daguwujul|daguwujul]] || [[word:daguwushul|daguwushul]] || [[word:daguwukul|daguwukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:daguwuthuthu|daguwuthuthu]] || [[word:daguwujuju|daguwujuju]] || [[word:daguwushushu|daguwushushu]] || [[word:daguwuku|daguwuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:daguwuthun|daguwuthun]] || [[word:daguwujun|daguwujun]] || [[word:daguwushun|daguwushun]] || [[word:daguwukun|daguwukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:daguwuthuoro|daguwuthuoro]] || [[word:daguwujuoro|daguwujuoro]] || [[word:daguwushuoro|daguwushuoro]] || [[word:daguwukuoro|daguwukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
